headline: RBC Capital Maintains Sector Perform on Alexandria Real Estate, Lowers Price Target to $50
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Michael Carroll   maintains Alexandria Real Estate (NYSE:ARE) with a Sector Perform and lowers the price target from $60 to $50.
